nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Baron Einion ap Celynin was born in 1268, in Llwydiarth Park, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Mr. ap Ceylynin and Unknown. He married Gwenllian verch Adda about 1307. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1340, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Einion ap Celynin(은)는 1268년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 w이디아르스 박에서 Mr. ap Ceylynin(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1307년 Gwenllian verch Adda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 영국 웨일스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Baron Einion ap Celynin родился в 1268 г. в местности ллвидярт парк, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Mr. ap Ceylynin и Unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Adda около 1307 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1340 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
